title: Forms - Add functionality to Drag and Drop into attachments field in Monday.com forms
excerpt: We need the Monday.com form to have functionality for attachments (word, jpeg, image, etc) via drag and drop. Is this functionality coming soon?

posts.author: janelegall (Jane)
